task: Analyze the provided Git repository fixture and identify background cache code related to stale issue state.

issue.title: Issue badges stay stale after background refresh
issue.body: After an issue is closed, the background refresh reports success but the graph still shows stale issue badges on the next read. The job writes analysis under an issue identifier while the read path uses a repository identifier.

comments.body: The frontend only displays cached backend data.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded Python files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search Python functions/classes in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: search_repo_text
tools.description: Search code text for symptoms and output strings.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Read bounded Python file contents from the repository.
